text.title: Trend Analysis Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are >=5 signal classes available for the trend?

conclusion.verdict: trend too early; broaden source pull or wait
wait one quarter to fit decay; emit interim hype-flag = unknown

example.trace: signals=5 -> history=>=1q -> composite=72, decay slope -5%/q, verdict=structural.

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
